fix_decisions.claim_text: source_available bundle with no detected occurrence silently continues (conflated with real-zero)
fix_decisions.evidence: MEDIUM. The row is NOT dropped (stays eligible+source_available); it contributes zero launches, indistinguishable from a genuine no-launch session. A distinct extraction-gap reason code is a deeper design change threading a new signal through metrics/report; Wave-1 edge (registry/detector skew). Parked for a follow-up.

fix_decisions.claim_text: malformed cloud_mappings surfaces only via stderr, not an in-band coverage flag
fix_decisions.evidence: F5 already made it a LOUD stderr degradation (satisfies the repo's loud-degradation requirement). A machine-readable in-band eligibility_unresolved flag is an enhancement (threading through build_cloud_census); parked.

fix_decisions.claim_text: workspace coverage scans the whole lifecycle window, not just the launch's mutation window
fix_decisions.evidence: G3 hardened the substring-looseness with word boundaries. Window-scoping is a further conservative refinement; candidates are already manual-review-gated. Parked.

fix_decisions.claim_text: retrigger_evidence bool default False conflates unknown with no-retrigger (fail-open if future adapter improves ws coverage)
fix_decisions.evidence: Forward-looking. Wave-1 never sets it True and ws coverage is ~always incomplete; documented design boundary. Tri-state is a future-adapter hardening; parked.

Coverage-expansion for code my fixes do not change. Added tests for everything I FIXED (+ the twice-flagged _validate_admitted_path security boundary). Broader coverage hardening is a follow-up test pass.

step_3_5_gate.findings: 1 Important (my doc reconciliation over-claimed: said the recorder corroborates before flagging embedded — it flags un-corroborated at prompt-submit) + 2 Suggestion (taxonomy chaining under-count; submodule plural)
step_3_5_gate.inner_fix: re-fixed all 3 in the same iteration (doc corrected against wfr:1304-1306; taxonomy made chaining-aware; \bsubmodules?\b). Re-verified: 53 module tests + full suite green.

skipped_checks.reason: working tree dirty at run time (grades committed HEAD); runs clean in CI

phase3_findings.description: _host_profile_from_manifest reads provider/devflow_version/claude_code_version as str, but recorder writes {value,source} dicts -> 3 of 5 stratify dims permanently None (wrong-shape-read class, masked by unrealistic test fixture)
_workspace_state HEAD bare substring 'head ' matches 'ahead of' (class-completion miss of G3)
build_cloud_census 'or bool(started_at)' re-admits a skipped job (unverified-assumption)
cloud census omits prior run attempts (latest-only) with no signal
eligible_lifecycles headline counts all rows incl ineligible/unknown
single-launch groups marked CONFIDENCE_EXACT inflate join_confidence_distribution

shadow.over_grade_gate: 3 promote-driving Important findings evaluated — H1 (skipped over-count) / H2 (false HEAD coverage) / H3 (dropped stratify dims) all silently corrupt the measurement (not fail-closed stops); Important grade holds, recorded not demoted. code-reviewer + comment-analyzer clean (confirm iter-2 eligibility/doc fixes hold).
shadow.root_cause_note: The recurring family (G-A, H3) is 'analyzer reads a manifest field with a shape/assumption the recorder does not honor', MASKED by an unrealistic test fixture (bare strings, provisional=False). Iteration 3 fixes the last wrong-shape read AND makes the fixture realistic ({value,source} dicts) so the masking mechanism is removed.
